channel.title: Cenk Kurtoğlu — Digital Product Releases
channel.description: Verified apps, AI automation, downloadable kits, and editable source products by Cenk Kurtoğlu.

item.title: Abonem — Subscription Tracker for iPhone and iPad
item.description: A free subscription and recurring-bill tracker with optional Premium in-app purchases. Regional pricing is shown by Apple.

item.title: llms.txt Generator — Apify Actor and API Automation
item.description: Generate llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and an exportable page dataset. Public price starts at $5 per 1,000 results.

item.title: SaaS Launch Swipe File
item.description: A downloadable kit with 40+ fill-in launch templates, a seven-day plan, Product Hunt materials, channel-specific copy, and a checklist. One-time price: $19 USD.

item.title: Premium Nexus Studio — Cinematic 3D Next.js Template
item.description: An editable cinematic 3D Next.js studio starting point for agencies and developers. One-time price: $250 USD. Demo names, claims, metrics, awards, and testimonials are placeholders.

item.title: 20 Next.js Website Templates for Agencies and Freelancers
item.description: Twenty editable niche-focused website starters built with Next.js 15.1, React 19, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS 3.4. One-time price: $79 USD.

item.title: Meridian — Animated Next.js Agency Source
item.description: An animated standalone Next.js agency starting point. One-time price: $100 USD.

item.title: Clean Studio — Minimal Next.js Agency Source
item.description: A focused standalone Next.js agency starting point. One-time price: $50 USD.
